title: BBAI Stock Slips As Earnings Miss Outweighs Guidance
text: BBAI stock slipped as earnings miss outweighs positive guidance announcements. BigBear.ai reported mixed Q1 2026 results with revenue of $34.4 million, landing modestly above the FactSet consensus estimate of $33.6 million, but missing earnings expectations with an EPS of -$0.12 versus the forecast of -$0.08. Despite the revenue beat, the earnings miss triggered a negative market reaction. The company reaffirmed its 2026 guidance for $135 million to $165 million in revenue, suggesting approximately 17% growth at the midpoint. However, the stock's post-earnings reaction highlights investor concerns about the company's path to profitability despite growing backlog.
